name: Forum
about: Forum is a multi-sport venue in Delano, MN, featuring indoor pickleball courts, a health club, and two Trackman iO golf simulators. The simulators are located in a private lounge overlooking the pickleball courts. The facility offers a membership model that includes complimentary access to fitness areas, locker rooms, and sauna facilities. Reservations for the golf simulators can be booked online, and the venue is marketed as a place to practice, compete, or have fun with a realistic golfing experience. The space also includes amenities such as complimentary coffee and healthy grab-and-go snacks, and free parking is available.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional swing analysis with Trackman iO technology
Access to hundreds of world-class courses
Private, comfortable lounge environment overlooking courts
Realistic gameplay measuring ball flight data
Team-based formats like Scramble for social play

food_and_drink.notes: Complimentary coffee and healthy grab-and-go snacks and meals available.
No mention of alcohol service on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two simulators located in a private lounge.
